name: Silent Image
description: You create the image of an object, a creature, or some other visible phenomenon that is no larger than a 15-foot Cube within range. The image lasts for the duration. It is purely visual; it isn't accompanied by sound, smell, or other sensations. You can use a Magic action to cause it to move; physical interaction reveals it as illusion (since things can pass through it). A creature can use its action to inspect the image and discern its true nature with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC.
